meaning: adj.上述的,前述的(常用于法律文件)
examples: Foreign exchange control agencies are entitled to regulate and inspect aforesaid issues.
Save as aforesaid any words or expressions defined in the Ordinance shall bear the same meaning in these Articles.
The aforesaid amount (s) shall include interests and reasonable fees and expenses which might be incurred for arbitration.
If you upload a shot of the Eiffel Tower, it'll show up whenever you search for the aforesaid icon.
We should also point out that the the aforesaid bar is shorter than we expected, which was both a blessing and a curse.
